case_title: GENERATIVE DYNAMICS, LLC. VS. SUKANN YEE

docket_entries.description: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (SC-109) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENERATIVE DYNAMICS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, SUKANN
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GENERATIVE DYNAMICS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, SUKANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT YEE, SUKANN AS TO PLAINTIFF GENERATIVE DYNAMICS, LLC.
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: VENUE IS IMPROPER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $200) SERVED JAN-24-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, SUKANN
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 11/28/22. ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO GENERATIVE DYNAMICS, LLC-RTS/UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAY-05-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GENERATIVE DYNAMICS, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JAMELLEH KISWANI, OWNER. DEFENDANT SU KANN YEE IS NOT PRESENT. CASE CONTINUED TO ALLOW THE COURT TO MAKE DETERMINATIONS ON VENUE CHALLENGE AND POSSIBLE SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF GENERATIVE DYNAMICS, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SUKANN YEE. THE COURT FINDS VENUE IS IMPROPER. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
